shaders.vertex: attribute vec2 position; varying vec2 texCoord; void main(){ texCoord = position * 0.5 + 0.5; gl_Position = vec4(position,0.0,1.0); }
shaders.fragment: precision mediump float; uniform sampler2D texture; varying vec2 texCoord; uniform vec2 topLeft; uniform vec2 topRight; uniform vec2 bottomLeft; uniform vec2 bottomRight; vec2 bilerp(vec2 a, vec2 b, vec2 c, vec2 d, vec2 t){ return mix(mix(a,b,t.x), mix(c,d,t.x), t.y);} void main(){ vec2 coord = bilerp(topLeft, topRight, bottomLeft, bottomRight, texCoord); gl_FragColor = texture2D(texture, coord); }

shaders.vertex: attribute vec2 position; varying vec2 texCoord; void main(){ texCoord = position * 0.5 + 0.5; gl_Position = vec4(position,0.0,1.0); }
shaders.fragment: precision mediump float; uniform sampler2D texture; uniform mat3 matrix; varying vec2 texCoord; void main(){ vec3 coord = matrix * vec3(texCoord,1.0); gl_FragColor = texture2D(texture, coord.xy); }

shaders.vertex: attribute vec2 position; varying vec2 texCoord; void main(){ texCoord = position * 0.5 + 0.5; gl_Position = vec4(position,0.0,1.0); }
shaders.fragment: precision mediump float; uniform sampler2D texture; varying vec2 texCoord; uniform vec2 center; uniform float radius; uniform float strength; void main(){ vec2 coord = texCoord - center; float dist = length(coord); if(dist < radius){ float percent = dist / radius; float factor = mix(1.0, pow(percent, 1.0 - strength), strength); coord *= factor; } gl_FragColor = texture2D(texture, coord + center); }

shaders.vertex: attribute vec2 position; varying vec2 texCoord; void main(){ texCoord = position * 0.5 + 0.5; gl_Position = vec4(position,0.0,1.0); }
shaders.fragment: precision mediump float; uniform sampler2D texture; varying vec2 texCoord; uniform vec2 center; uniform float radius; uniform float angle; void main(){ vec2 coord = texCoord - center; float dist = length(coord); if(dist < radius){ float percent = (radius - dist) / radius; float theta = percent * percent * angle; float s = sin(theta); float c = cos(theta); coord = vec2(coord.x * c - coord.y * s, coord.x * s + coord.y * c); } gl_FragColor = texture2D(texture, coord + center); }
